The Living Room

A house built from small rituals.

I started this page the way I start most mornings — without rushing it. The Soft Life isn't about doing less; it's about doing things on purpose, slowly, until they feel like yours again.

Hover the objects beside me. Each one holds a small story from the room I write from.

i. Begin the day before your phone does.
ii. Let one thing each day take longer than it needs to.
iii. Make tea for one, slowly, as if for two.
iv. Keep a room you'd want to come home to.

find the door that isn't there

"Some mornings I write to no one in particular — just to remember the light was here."

— a thought, kept until now
